name: Precision Golf Lab
about: Precision Golf Lab offers a 24/7 unmanned private golf simulator experience powered by TrackMan iO. The facility provides a climate-controlled bay environment for year-round play, practice, and competition. Pricing is structured around an hourly rate of $50 or a monthly membership at $99, which includes four hours of golf time per month. It is best suited for golfers seeking convenient, high-tech practice and virtual play without needing to book staffed sessions or rely on weather conditions.
why_golfers_like_it: Tour-grade TrackMan iO radar and AI-powered video tracking provides instant data on ball speed, launch angle, spin rate, and club path
Access to over 400 virtual courses available year-round for play, practice, or league competition
24/7 unmanned access with booking codes for door and computer, allowing for completely flexible scheduling
Climate-controlled private bays offer perfect comfort regardless of weather conditions

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB policy; no on-site food or drinks mentioned, suggesting patrons may bring their own.
BYOB policy; no on-site bar or alcohol sales mentioned.

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar system paired with AI-powered video tracking for precise ball and club data.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify club rentals, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs for your session.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility operates on a BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) policy, allowing you to bring your own food and drinks.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide a specific time for 18 holes, but sessions are booked by the hour or half-hour, allowing players to choose their own duration.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website does not mention specific amenities or policies for children, so it is unclear if the venue is kid-friendly.
